name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: The Dothraki sea,” Ser Jorah Mormont said as he reined to a halt beside her on the top of the ridge. beneath them, the plain stretched out immense and empty, a vast flat expanse that reached to the distant horizon and beyond. It was a sea, Dany thought. Past here, there were no hills, no mountains, no trees nor cities nor roads, only the endless grasses, the tall blades rippling like waves when the winds blew. “It’s so green,” she said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Ser Jorah在山脊上指出无边草原名为Dothraki sea；Daenerys惊叹其绿色。
blocks.literary_note_zh: sea首先是Jorah给出的地名，Daenerys再用波浪草叶验证比喻；陌生地理通过熟悉水域概念变得可理解。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Here and now,” Ser Jorah agreed. “You ought to see it when it blooms, all dark red flowers from horizon to horizon, like a sea of blood. Come the dry season, and the world turns the color of old bronze. And this is only hranna, child. There are a hundred kinds of grass out there, grasses as yellow as lemon and as dark as indigo, blue grasses and orange grasses and grasses like rainbows. Down in the Shadow Lands beyond Asshai, they say there are oceans of ghost grass, taller than a man on horseback with stalks as pale as milkglass. It murders all other grass and glows in the dark with the spirits of the damned. The Dothraki claim that someday ghost grass will cover the entire world, and then all life will end.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah描述hranna四季颜色、百种草及传说会吞噬世界的ghost grass。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 草色从花海、血海到bronze再到末日ghost grass，Jorah让美景始终带有季节变化和死亡阴影。
blocks.background_zh: **植物／传说：** hranna是Dothraki sea常见草种；ghost grass末日扩张是Dothraki传说，不是已验证生态事实。

blocks.original_text: That thought gave Dany the shivers. “I don’t want to talk about that now,” she said. “It’s so beautiful here, I don’t want to think about everything dying.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys因死亡预言发冷，要求暂时只欣赏眼前美景。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys主动规定谈话内容，不是否认死亡，而是争取此刻欣赏美的心理边界。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “As you will, Khaleesi,” Ser Jorah said respectfully.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah以Khaleesi身份尊重她的选择。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dothraki sea的美景让Daenerys第一次以khaleesi身份命令队伍，并通过驾驭silver获得不依赖Viserys授予的princess感。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: She heard the sound of voices and turned to look behind her. She and Mormont had outdistanced the rest of their party, and now the others were climbing the ridge below them. Her handmaid Irri and the young archers of her khas were fluid as centaurs, but Viserys still struggled with the short stirrups and the flat saddle. Her brother was miserable out here. He ought never have come. Magister Illyrio had urged him to wait in Pentos, had offered him the hospitality of his manse, but Viserys would have none of it. He would stay with Drogo until the debt had been paid, until he had the crown he had been promised. “And if he tries to cheat me, he will learn to his sorrow what it means to wake the dragon,” Viserys had vowed, laying a hand on his borrowed sword. Illyrio had blinked at that and wished him good fortune.
blocks.explanation_zh: 身后队伍追来；Viserys不适应骑行却拒绝留Pentos，坚持跟Drogo等取回承诺王冠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dothraki sea的美景让Daenerys第一次以khaleesi身份命令队伍，并通过驾驭silver获得不依赖Viserys授予的princess感。
blocks.background_zh: **政治交易：** Viserys相信Drogo欠他军队和crown，因此拒绝留在Pentos；Illyrio没有保证具体付款时间。

blocks.original_text: Dany realized that she did not want to listen to any of her brother’s complaints right now. The day was too perfect. The sky was a deep blue, and high above them a hunting hawk circled. The grass sea swayed and sighed with each breath of wind, the air was warm on her face, and Dany felt at peace. She would not let Viserys spoil it.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys不愿让Viserys抱怨毁掉完美的天空、风和草海。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dothraki sea的美景让Daenerys第一次以khaleesi身份命令队伍，并通过驾驭silver获得不依赖Viserys授予的princess感。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Wait here,” Dany told Ser Jorah. “Tell them all to stay. Tell them I command it.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她命Jorah让所有人停留原地，并强调这是自己的command。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Tell them I command it是她第一次明确把khaleesi身份变成可执行命令。
blocks.background_zh: **身份：** khas是khaleesi的个人护卫骑手；她的命令可经Jorah或Irri翻译执行。

blocks.original_text: The knight smiled. Ser Jorah was not a handsome man. He had a neck and shoulders like a bull, and coarse black hair covered his arms and chest so thickly that there was none left for his head. Yet his smiles gave Dany comfort. “You are learning to talk like a queen, Daenerys.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah称她逐渐像queen说话，笑容给她安慰。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dothraki sea的美景让Daenerys第一次以khaleesi身份命令队伍，并通过驾驭silver获得不依赖Viserys授予的princess感。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Not a queen,” said Dany. “A khaleesi.” She wheeled her horse about and galloped down the ridge alone.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys纠正自己不是queen而是khaleesi，独自策马下坡。
blocks.literary_note_zh: queen来自Jorah熟悉的Westerosi框架，khaleesi是Daenerys主动选择的新身份。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The descent was steep and rocky, but Dany rode fearlessly, and the joy and the danger of it were a song in her heart. All her life Viserys had told her she was a princess, but not until she rode her silver had Daenerys Targaryen ever felt like one.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她无畏冲下陡坡，第一次因骑silver而真正感到自己像princess。
blocks.literary_note_zh: princess感不再来自Viserys反复告知，而来自自己驾驭silver的身体能力。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: At first it had not come easy. The khalasar had broken camp the morning after her wedding, moving east toward Vaes Dothrak, and by the third day Dany thought she was going to die. Saddle sores opened on her bottom, hideous and bloody. Her thighs were chafed raw, her hands blistered from the reins, the muscles of her legs and back so wracked with pain that she could scarcely sit. By the time dusk fell, her handmaids would need to help her down from her mount.
blocks.explanation_zh: 回忆旅程初期，连续骑行使她出现严重磨伤、手泡和肌肉疼痛，甚至无法独自下马。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 适应不是突然奇迹的背景板；伤口、blisters和肌肉痛让后面的熟练具有身体成本。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.214 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: 夜间亲密关系同样让Daenerys痛苦、缺乏控制并孤立；涉及明确未成年角色的露骨细节不复录。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段揭示婚姻初期的孤立、痛苦与权力不对等；不因后续适应而倒推成最初自愿。
blocks.background_zh: **安全说明：** 原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，本地精读保留页码、叙事功能与权力分析，不逐字复录露骨细节。

blocks.original_text: Day followed day, and night followed night, until Dany knew she could not endure a moment longer. She would kill herself rather than go on, she decided one night . . .
blocks.explanation_zh: 持续痛苦一度使她认为宁可结束生命也无法继续。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 回忆揭示旅程和婚姻初期的严重身体痛苦；dragon dream后，她通过持续适应变强并开始看见沿途世界。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Yet when she slept that night, she dreamt the dragon dream again. Viserys was not in it this time. There was only her and the dragon. Its scales were black as night, wet and slick with blood. Her blood, Dany sensed. Its eyes were pools of molten magma, and when it opened its mouth, the flame came roaring out in a hot jet. She could hear it singing to her, She opened her arms to the fire, embraced it, let it swallow her whole, let it cleanse her and temper her and scour her clean. She could feel her flesh sear and blacken and slough away, could feel her blood boil and turn to steam, and yet there was no pain. She felt strong and new and fierce.
blocks.explanation_zh: dragon dream中黑龙与她的血和火相连；火焰焚去旧肉身却不痛，使她感到强、新、凶猛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon dream把毁灭与锻造结合：scour、cleanse、temper都是先破坏旧形态再形成新强度。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: And the next day, strangely, she did not seem to hurt quite so much. It was as if the gods had heard her and taken pity. Even her handmaids noticed the change. “Khaleesi,” Jhiqui said, “what is wrong? Are you sick?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 次日身体痛苦莫名减轻，handmaids反而担心她是否生病。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 回忆揭示旅程和婚姻初期的严重身体痛苦；dragon dream后，她通过持续适应变强并开始看见沿途世界。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “I was,” she answered, standing over the dragon’s eggs that Illyrio had given her when she wed. She touched one, the largest of the three, running her hand lightly over the shelf. Black-and-scarlet, she thought, like the dragon in my dream. The stone felt strangely warm beneath her fingers . . . or was she still dreaming? She pulled her hand back nervously.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她回答自己过去病了，并发现黑红dragon egg触感似乎异常温暖。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 黑红蛋对应dream dragon；warm可是真实触觉也可受梦影响，Daenerys自己也不确定。
blocks.background_zh: **dragon eggs：** 三枚化石蛋是Illyrio婚礼礼物，公开解释为stone；Daenerys此刻感到其中一枚warm。

blocks.original_text: From that hour onward, each day was easier than the one before it. Her legs grew stronger; her blisters burst and her hands grew callused; her soft thighs toughened, supple as leather.
blocks.explanation_zh: 自此身体逐日适应：腿更强、手掌起茧、皮肤和肌肉变得坚韧。
blocks.literary_note_zh: callus和toughened写的是重复劳动后的生理适应，而不是单凭意志消失疼痛。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The khal had commanded the handmaid Irri to teach Dany to ride in the Dothraki fashion, but it was the filly who was her real teacher. The horse seemed to know her moods, as if they shared a single mind. With every passing day, Dany felt surer in her seat. The Dothraki were a hard and unsentimental people, and it was not their custom to name their animals, so Dany thought of her only as the silver. She had never loved anything so much.
blocks.explanation_zh: Irri教技巧，silver却像理解情绪的真正老师；Dothraki不为马命名，她仍深深爱它。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Irri是正式teacher，silver是关系性的teacher；Daenerys从动物反馈学习，形成与Dothraki不同的爱马方式。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: As the riding became less an ordeal, Dany began to notice the beauties of the land around her. She rode at the head of the khalasar with Drogo and his bloodriders, so she came to each country fresh and unspoiled. Behind them the great horde might tear the earth and muddy the rivers and send up clouds of choking dust, but the fields ahead of them were always green and verdant.
blocks.explanation_zh: 骑行不再折磨后，她看见前方土地美丽，也注意到身后khalasar对环境的破坏。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她位于horde前方所以总看见unspoiled绿色，文本同时让读者看见身后破坏，视角位置制造选择性美景。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: They crossed the rolling hills of Norvos, past terraced farms and small villages where the townsfolk watched anxiously from atop white stucco walls. They forded three wide placid rivers and a fourth that was swift and narrow and treacherous, camped beside a high blue waterfall, skirted the tumbled ruins of a vast dead city where ghosts were said to moan among blackened marble columns. They raced down Valyrian roads a thousand years old and straight as a Dothraki arrow. For half a moon, they rode through the Forest of Qohor, where the leaves made a golden canopy high above them, and the trunks of the trees were as wide as city gates. There were great elk in that wood, and spotted tigers, and lemurs with silver fur and huge purple eyes, but all fled before the approach of the khalasar and Dany got no glimpse of them.
blocks.explanation_zh: 旅程穿过Norvos、河流、瀑布、死城、Valyrian roads和Qohor forest，动物在horde前逃散。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 长地名和景物列举把旅程展开成大陆尺度；所有动物逃走则让khalasar始终像自然灾害逼近。
blocks.background_zh: **路线：** khalasar从Pentos附近向东，经Norvos、Qohor一带前往Vaes Dothrak；Valyrian roads早于当前Free Cities。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.216 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: 长途骑行仍疼却带来成就感，夜间夫妻关系也开始出现部分主动适应；不复录未成年角色露骨细节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 回忆揭示旅程和婚姻初期的严重身体痛苦；dragon dream后，她通过持续适应变强并开始看见沿途世界。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: At the bottom of the ridge, the grasses rose around her, tall and supple. Dany slowed to a trot and rode out onto the plain, losing herself in the green, blessedly alone. In the khalasar she was never alone. Khal Drogo came to her only after the sun went down, but her handmaids fed her and bathed her and slept by the door of her tent, Drogo’s bloodriders and the men of her khas were never far, and her brother was an unwelcome shadow, day and night. Dany could hear him on the top of the ridge, his voice shrill with anger as he shouted at Ser Jorah. She rode on, submerging herself deeper in the Dothraki sea.
blocks.explanation_zh: 山脚Daenerys独自深入草海，暂时摆脱handmaids、guards、Drogo与Viserys的持续注视。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 身份提升并未带来privacy，她必须骑进草海才能短暂不被服务、保护、婚姻或兄长包围。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The green swallowed her up. The air was rich with the scents of earth and grass, mixed with the smell of horseflesh and Dany’s sweat and the oil in her hair. Dothraki smells. They seemed to belong here. Dany breathed it all in, laughing. She had a sudden urge to feel the ground beneath her, to curl her toes in that thick black soil. Swinging down from her saddle, she let the silver graze while she pulled off her high boots.
blocks.explanation_zh: 泥土、草、马和油发气味已像属于此地；她下马赤足触碰黑土。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Dothraki smells从陌生变belong，归属通过身体气味而非政治宣言建立。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Viserys came upon her as sudden as a summer storm, his horse rearing beneath him as he reined up too hard. “You dare!” he screamed at her. “You give commands to me? To me?” He vaulted off the horse, stumbling as he landed. His face was flushed as he struggled back to his feet. He grabbed her, shook her. “Have you forgotten who you are? Look at you. Look at you!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys暴怒冲来，因她向自己下令而抓住摇晃她。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys的You dare针对的不是命令内容，而是妹妹竟拥有命令他的资格。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Dany did not need to look. She was barefoot, with oiled hair, wearing Dothraki riding leathers and a painted vest given her as a bride gift. She looked as though she belonged here. Viserys was soiled and stained in city silks and ringmail.
blocks.explanation_zh: 两人外观形成反转：Daenerys赤足穿Dothraki服装、自然归属，Viserys的city silks和mail肮脏失配。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 两套衣着不是单纯美丑：Daenerys的本地服装适应环境，Viserys的city silks与ringmail只证明旧身份执念。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.216 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys以王权和性别侮辱她，并实施带性意味的身体侵犯；因Daenerys未成年不复录露骨细节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 王权侮辱和身体侵犯同时试图把Daenerys重新压回可支配妹妹位置。
blocks.background_zh: **安全说明：** 本段涉及成年人对未成年Daenerys的性化身体侵犯，不复录露骨原句；保留其暴力和权力意义。

blocks.original_text: Dany shoved him away, hard.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys用力推开他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 极短句没有辩解或请求，身体push成为长期恐惧关系的断裂点。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Viserys stared at her, his lilac eyes incredulous. She had never defied him. Never fought back. Rage twisted his features. He would hurt her now, and badly, she knew that.
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys因她首次反抗而难以置信，随即暴怒；Daenerys预期严重报复。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Viserys最震惊的是never defied；他的权威依赖Daenerys过去从不反抗，而非当下实际支持。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Crack.
blocks.explanation_zh: 独立拟声词Crack宣告whip突然介入。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Crack独立成段，让读者先听见whip再知道行动者，与Daenerys同样突然。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The whip made a sound like thunder. The coil took Viserys around the throat and yanked him backward. He went sprawling in the grass, stunned and choking. The Dothraki riders hooted at him as he struggled to free himself. The one with the whip, young Jhogo, rasped a question. Dany did not understand his words, but by then Irri was there, and Ser Jorah, and the rest of her khas. “Jhogo asks if you would have him dead, Khaleesi, “ Irri said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhogo用whip套住Viserys脖颈并问Khaleesi是否要杀他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jhogo问是否要他dead，说明khas把保护khaleesi理解为可立即使用致命暴力。
blocks.background_zh: **khas职责：** Jhogo等人负责保护khaleesi，面对Viserys攻击会询问她是否授权致死惩罚。

blocks.original_text: “No,” Dany replied. “No.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys立即两次拒绝处死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 两次No保留Daenerys对Viserys的亲情和界线：反抗不等于选择杀死。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Jhogo understood that. One of the others barked out a comment, and the Dothraki laughed. Irri told her, “Quaro thinks you should take an ear to teach him respect.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Quaro建议割耳教训，Dothraki把Viserys屈辱当作笑料。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Her brother was on his knees, his fingers digging under the leather coils, crying incoherently, struggling for breath. The whip was tight around his windpipe.
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys跪地窒息挣扎。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Tell them I do not wish him harmed,” Dany said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys再次命令不要伤害他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Irri repeated her words in Dothraki. Jhogo gave a pull on the whip, yanking Viserys around like a puppet on a string. He went sprawling again, freed from the leather embrace, a thin line of blood under his chin where the whip had cut deep.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhogo放开whip，Viserys喉下留下细血痕。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “I warned him what would happen, my lady,” Ser Jorah Mormont said. “I told him to stay on the ridge, as you commanded.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah说已按Daenerys命令警告Viserys留在山脊。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “I know you did,” Dany replied, watching Viserys. He lay on the ground, sucking in air noisily, red-faced and sobbing. He was a pitiful thing. He had always been a pitiful thing. Why had she never seen that before? There was a hollow place inside her where her fear had been.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她看着哭泣的兄长，首次看见他一直pitiful，发现体内原先恐惧之处变空。
blocks.literary_note_zh: hollow place不是恐惧被另一情绪填满，而是原本支撑Viserys权威的恐惧突然消失。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Take his horse,” Dany commanded Ser Jorah. Viserys gaped at her. He could not believe what he was hearing; nor could Dany quite believe what she was saying. Yet the words came. “Let my brother walk behind us back to the khalasar.” Among the Dothraki, the man who does not ride was no man at all, the lowest of the low, without honor or pride. “Let everyone see him as he is.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys命没收Viserys的马，让他步行回khalasar并公开显出真实地位。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 没收horse在Dothraki文化中是公开降格；Daenerys第一次熟练运用新社会的symbolic punishment。
blocks.background_zh: **Dothraki地位：** 能骑马与成年男性荣誉紧密相连；walker是失去坐骑、在队尾步行的公开羞辱身份。

blocks.original_text: “No!” Viserys screamed. He turned to Ser Jorah, pleading in the Common Tongue with words the horsemen would not understand. “Hit her, Mormont. Hurt her. Your king commands it. Kill these Dothraki dogs and teach her.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys向Jorah下令打伤Daenerys、杀Dothraki，仍自称king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The exile knight looked from Dany to her brother; she barefoot, with dirt between her toes and oil in her hair, he with his silks and steel. Dany could see the decision on his face. “He shall walk, Khaleesi,” he said. He took her brother’s horse in hand while Dany remounted her silver.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah比较二人外貌和处境后选择服从Daenerys，牵走Viserys坐骑。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah的decision通过目光比较呈现；他从旧誓言与现实权威间选择当前能command的人。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Viserys gaped at him, and sat down in the dirt. He kept his silence, but he would not move, and his eyes were full of poison as they rode away. Soon he was lost in the tall grass. When they could not see him anymore, Dany grew afraid. “Will he find his way back?” she asked Ser Jorah as they rode.
blocks.explanation_zh: Viserys拒绝走，众人骑离后Daenerys又担心他能否回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Even a man as blind as your brother should be able to follow our trail,” he replied.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah说再blind的人也能沿大队踪迹返回。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “He is proud. He may be too shamed to come back.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys担心兄长因羞耻不肯回来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Jorah laughed. “Where else should he go? If he cannot find the khalasar, the khalasar will most surely find him. It is hard to drown in the Dothraki sea, child.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah说khalasar也会找到他，草海很难真正“淹死”人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Daenerys为争取独处遭Viserys侵犯，首次反击；khas保护她，她拒绝杀兄却以没收horse公开剥夺其Dothraki尊严。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Dany saw the truth of that. The khalasar was like a city on the march, but it did not march blindly. Always scouts ranged far ahead of the main column, alert for any sign of game or prey or enemies, while outriders guarded their flanks. They missed nothing, not here, in this land, the place where they had come from. These plains were a part of them . . . and of her, now.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys理解scouts和outriders让移动城市不漏目标，并感到草原如今也是自己的一部分。
blocks.literary_note_zh: khalasar如city却靠scouts和outriders感知环境；Daenerys的‘of her now’把归属从服饰推进到空间。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “I hit him,” she said, wonder in her voice. Now that it was over, it seemed like some strange dream that she had dreamed. “Ser Jorah, do you think . . . he’ll be so angry when he gets back . . . She shivered. “I woke the dragon, didn’t I?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她惊讶自己真的反击兄长，又怕已wake the dragon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: wake the dragon曾是Viserys控制她的威胁；反抗后她仍条件反射地用此框架预测惩罚。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah snorted. “Can you wake the dead, girl? Your brother Rhaegar was the last dragon, and he died on the Trident. Viserys is less than the shadow of a snake.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah说Rhaegar才是last dragon，Viserys连蛇影都不如。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah把dragon称号从血统自动权利改成配得上的人格评价，并以Rhaegar否定Viserys。
blocks.background_zh: **人物评价：** Jorah称Rhaegar为last dragon、Viserys为snake shadow，这是他的价值判断，不是法律继承结论。

blocks.original_text: His blunt words startled her. It seemed as though all the things she had always believed were suddenly called into question. “You . . . you swore him your sword . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys震惊，因为Jorah曾向Viserysswear sword。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “That I did, girl,” Ser Jorah said. “And if your brother is the shadow of a snake, what does that make his servants?” His voice was bitter.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah苦涩说若主人是蛇影，servant又算什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “He is still the true king. He is . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys仍试图重复Viserys是true king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Jorah pulled up his horse and looked at her. “Truth now. Would you want to see Viserys sit a throne?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah逼她诚实回答是否愿看Viserys坐throne。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Truth now迫使Daenerys从合法继承口号转向治理能力问题。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Dany thought about that. “He would not be a very good king, would he?”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她思考后承认他不会是好king。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “There have been worse . . . but not many.” The knight gave his heels to his mount and started off again.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah说虽有更坏者，却不多。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Dany rode close beside him. “Still,” she said, “the common people are waiting for him. Magister Illyrio says they are sewing dragon banners and praying for Viserys to return from across the narrow sea to free them.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys仍复述Illyrio所说common people缝dragon banners、等待Viserys解放。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “The common people pray for rain, healthy children, and a summer that never ends,” Ser Jorah told her. “It is no matter to them if the high lords play their game of thrones, so long as they are left in peace.” He gave a shrug. “They never are.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah说ordinary people只求雨、健康孩子和和平，不在乎high lords的game of thrones。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah把game of thrones与普通人的雨、孩子、季节并置，提出政权合法性之外的生活尺度。
blocks.background_zh: **政治视角：** Jorah认为smallfolk优先在意生计与和平；这是经验判断，反驳Illyrio关于民众秘密拥护Viserys的说法。

blocks.original_text: Dany rode along quietly for a time, working his words like a puzzle box. It went against everything that Viserys had ever told her to think that the people could care so little whether a true king or a usurper reigned over them. Yet the more she thought on Jorah’s words, the more they rang of truth.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这与Viserys教导冲突，但Daenerys越想越觉得真实。
blocks.literary_note_zh: words ring of truth说明Daenerys不是因权威替换权威，而是让新命题与观察相互校验。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “What do you pray for, Ser Jorah?” she asked him.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她问Jorah祈求什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Home,” he said. His voice was thick with longing.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah带浓重渴望回答home。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah只用Home，极短回答显露流亡者最深愿望，也与Daenerys形成共同经验。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “I pray for home too,” she told him, believing it.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys说自己也祈求home，并真心相信。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah laughed. “Look around you then, Khaleesi.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah笑叫她环顾周围。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Look around既可指草海已成home，也挑战她仍把未见过的Westeros当唯一归属。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: But it was not the plains Dany saw then. It was King’s Landing and the great Red Keep that Aegon the Conqueror had built. It was Dragonstone where she had been born. In her mind’s eye they burned with a thousand lights, a fire blazing in every window. In her mind’s eye, all the doors were red.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她想到的home仍是灯火中的King’s Landing、Red Keep和出生地Dragonstone。
blocks.literary_note_zh: red doors把多个Westerosi地点融合进童年home意象；记忆的情感真实性不等于地理准确。
blocks.background_zh: **home意象：** Daenerys出生Dragonstone、幼年流亡；red door来自她最温暖的早期居所记忆，而非Red Keep实地记忆。

blocks.original_text: “My brother will never take back the Seven Kingdoms,” Dany said. She had known that for a long time, she realized. She had known it all her life. Only she had never let herself say the words, even in a whisper, but now she said them for Jorah Mormont and all the world to hear.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys首次公开说Viserys永远无法夺回Seven Kingdoms，并意识到自己早已知道。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 公开说出早已知道之事是认知转折：知识只有脱离恐惧沉默后才能指导行动。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Ser Jorah gave her a measuring look. “You think not.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah用审视目光确认她的判断。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “He could not lead an army even if my lord husband gave him one,” Dany said. “He has no coin and the only knight who follows him reviles him as less than a snake. The Dothraki make mock of his weakness. He will never take us home.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她列出Viserys无军、无钱、唯一knight鄙视他、Dothraki嘲弱等领导失败。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她的论证从抽象true king改成资源、军队、追随者和他人评价，已采用现实政治标准。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Wise child.” The knight smiled.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jorah称她wise child。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Jorah拆解Viserys的dragon与true king叙事；Daenerys开始用领导能力、资源和普通人需要重新判断王权与home。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “I am no child,” she told him fiercely. Her heels pressed into the sides of her mount, rousing the silver to a gallop. Faster and faster she raced, leaving Jorah and Irri and the others far behind, the warm wind in her hair and the setting sun red on her face. By the time she reached the khalasar, it was dusk.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她强调自己不是child并策silver疾驰，把众人远远抛下。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “not child”后立即用骑行证明自主能力，但最后name day仍提醒读者她确实非常年幼。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The slaves had erected her tent by the shore of a spring-fed pool. She could hear rough voices from the woven grass palace on the hill. Soon there would be laughter, when the men of her khas told the story of what had happened in the grasses today. By the time Viserys came limping back among them, every man, woman, and child in the camp would know him for a walker. There were no secrets in the khalasar.
blocks.explanation_zh: 回营时她知道Viserys步行受辱会传遍全营，因为khalasar没有秘密。
blocks.literary_note_zh: no secrets解释公开羞辱为何有持续政治效果，也预示任何角色变化都会成为集体知识。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Dany gave the silver over to the slaves for grooming and entered her tent. It was cool and dim beneath the silk. As she let the door flap close behind her, Dany saw a finger of dusty red light reach out to touch her dragon’s eggs across the tent. For an instant a thousand droplets of scarlet flame swam before her eyes. She blinked, and they were gone.
blocks.explanation_zh: 帐内落日照dragon eggs，Daenerys一瞬看见红色火滴后又消失。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 火滴可能是光学效果或异象，文本只写瞬间感知并让她blink后消失。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Stone, she told herself. They are only stone, even Illyrio said so, the dragons are all dead. She put her palm against the black egg, fingers spread gently across the curve of the shell. The stone was warm. Almost hot. “The sun,” Dany whispered. “The sun warmed them as they rode.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 她用stone和sun解释黑蛋异常热度，试图压下奇异联想。
blocks.literary_note_zh: sun解释是Daenerys的自我安抚，不是由测量证实；蛋的warm仍保持歧义。
blocks.background_zh: **事实／解释：** 蛋触感warm由Daenerys报告；她以sun加热解释，原因尚未被独立确认。

blocks.original_text: She commanded her handmaids to prepare her a bath. Doreah built a fire outside the tent, while Irri and Jhiqui fetched the big copper tub—another bride gift—from the packhorses and carried water from the pool. When the bath was steaming, Irri helped her into it and climbed in after her.
blocks.explanation_zh: 她命handmaids准备热水bath。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Have you ever seen a dragon?” she asked as Irri scrubbed her back and Jhiqui sluiced sand from her hair. She had heard that the first dragons had come from the east, from the Shadow Lands beyond Asshai and the islands of the Jade Sea. Perhaps some were still living there, in realms strange and wild.
blocks.explanation_zh: 洗浴时她询问东方是否仍有living dragon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Dragons are gone, Khaleesi,” Irri said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Irri说dragons已经消失。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “Dead,” agreed Jhiqui. “Long and long ago.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhiqui同意它们很久以前就死了。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: Viserys had told her that the last Targaryen dragons had died no more than a century and a half ago, during the reign of Aegon III, who was called the Dragonbane. That did not seem so long ago to Dany. “Everywhere?” she said, disappointed. “Even in the east?” Magic had died in the west when the Doom fell on Valyria and the Lands of the Long Summer, and neither spell-forged steel nor stormsingers nor dragons could hold it back, but Dany had always heard that the east was different. It was said that manticores prowled the islands of the Jade Sea, that basilisks infested the jungles of Yi Ti, that spellsingers, warlocks, and aeromancers practiced their arts openly in Asshai, while shadowbinders and bloodmages worked terrible sorceries in the black of night. Why shouldn’t there be dragons too?
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys回忆Targaryen dragons约一百五十年前灭绝，并想到Doom后西方magic衰落、东方仍传manticore、warlock等奇术。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon extinction史与东方魔法传闻交叉；Daenerys的why not是希望性推理，不是龙存活证据。
blocks.background_zh: **历史／传闻：** Targaryen最后dragons约在Aegon III时期灭绝；Asshai、Yi Ti等东方魔法生物属于旅行传闻。

blocks.original_text: “No dragon,” Irri said. “Brave men kill them, for dragon terrible evil beasts. It is known.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Irri说勇士杀死邪恶dragon，并以It is known封闭争论。
blocks.literary_note_zh: It is known是文化确定性公式，重复本身不增加证据。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “It is known,” agreed Jhiqui.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhiqui重复It is known。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “A trader from Qarth once told me that dragons came from the moon,” blond Doreah said as she warmed a towel over the fire. Jhiqui and Irri were of an age with Dany, Dothraki girls taken as slaves when Drogo destroyed their father’s khalasar. Doreah was older, almost twenty. Magister Illyrio had found her in a pleasure house in Lys.
blocks.explanation_zh: Doreah转述Qarth trader的moon-egg龙起源故事；叙述也交代三名handmaids的奴役背景。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三名handmaids都处在被交易或征服形成的service关系中；亲密陪伴不能抹去奴役来源。
blocks.background_zh: **handmaids：** Irri与Jhiqui是Drogo击败其父khalasar后被奴役的Dothraki girls；Doreah来自Lys pleasure house，由Illyrio购得。

blocks.original_text: Silvery-wet hair tumbled across her eyes as Dany turned her head, curious. “The moon?”
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys好奇追问moon。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “He told me the moon was an egg, Khaleesi,” the Lysene girl said. “Once there were two moons in the sky, but one wandered too close to the sun and cracked from the heat. A thousand thousand dragons poured forth, and drank the fire of the sun. That is why dragons breathe flame. One day the other moon will kiss the sun too, and then it will crack and the dragons will return.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Doreah说曾有两月，一月被sun烤裂释放无数dragons，剩余moon未来也会裂开使龙归来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: moon egg故事把heat、cracking、eggs和dragon return连接，正好与Daenerys观察的warm eggs产生象征呼应。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: The two Dothraki girls giggled and laughed. “You are foolish strawhead slave,” Irri said. “Moon is no egg. Moon is god, woman wife of sun. It is known.”
blocks.explanation_zh: Dothraki girls嘲笑Doreah，提出moon是sun的女神妻子。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: “It is known,” Jhiqui agreed.
blocks.explanation_zh: Jhiqui再次以It is known同意。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。

blocks.original_text: Dany’s skin was flushed and pink when she climbed from the tub. Jhiqui laid her down to oil her body and scrape the dirt from her pores. Afterward Irri sprinkled her with spiceflower and cinnamon. While Doreah brushed her hair until it shone like spun silver, she thought about the moon, and eggs, and dragons.
blocks.explanation_zh: 洗浴护理中Daenerys持续思考moon、eggs和dragons。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。

blocks.original_text: Her supper was a simple meal of fruit and cheese and fry bread, with a jug of honeyed wine to wash it down. “Doreah, stay and eat with me,” Dany commanded when she sent her other handmaids away. The Lysene girl had hair the color of honey, and eyes like the summer sky.
blocks.explanation_zh: 晚餐后她命Doreah留下同食。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: She lowered those eyes when they were alone. “You honor me, Khaleesi,” she said, but it was no honor, only service. Long after the moon had risen, they sat together, talking.
blocks.explanation_zh: Doreah低眼说这是honor，叙述却指出这是service；二人长谈至深夜。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 文本直接纠正honor为service，提醒Daenerys的command即使温和也发生在不平等主从关系中。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys主动重新安排当夜与Drogo的相处方式，并要求到Dothraki认为重要之事应发生的open sky；不复录未成年角色露骨内容。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 她的主动性相较此前显著增加，但年龄与被安排婚姻的结构背景仍不可忽略。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.222 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: 她明确拒绝过去的被动方式，要求能看着Drogo的脸；不复录露骨细节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。

blocks.original_text: [原文涉及明确未成年角色的性内容，此处不逐字复录。请参见源 PDF p.222 中对应段落。]
blocks.explanation_zh: 在无privacy的khalasar中，Daenerys以khaleesi身份主动掌握互动，Drogo第一次呼喊她名字；不复录露骨细节。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Drogo呼喊name表示Daenerys从无名被动对象变成被识别的伴侣；不需要复述露骨动作也能看见叙事功能。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: They were on the far side of the Dothraki sea when Jhiqui brushed the soft swell of Dany’s stomach with her fingers and said, “Khaleesi, you are with child.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 旅至草海另一端时，Jhiqui从腹部变化判断Daenerys怀孕。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 怀孕让身体适应与权力变化进入继承和未来政治层面。
blocks.background_zh: **怀孕：** Jhiqui根据身体变化判断Daenerys with child；Daenerys说已知道，尚未提供maester式诊断。

blocks.original_text: “I know,” Dany told her.
blocks.explanation_zh: Daenerys说自己已经知道。
blocks.literary_note_zh: dragon eggs的异常温度与多种龙起源传说并置；Daenerys主动改变婚姻互动，随后确认怀孕，章末揭示十四岁。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增必须补充的世界观事实；重点在Daenerys的身体适应、khaleesi权威、Viserys权威崩塌、home观念或dragon传说。

blocks.original_text: It was her fourteenth name day.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这一天是她十四岁name day。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 四teen name day置于章末，刻意迫使读者用年龄重新衡量此前所有‘not a child’和婚姻经历。
blocks.background_zh: **年龄：** 本段明确这是Daenerys十四岁name day；因此前述婚姻和怀孕均发生于明确未成年时期。
